buddies.name: Riya Sharma
buddies.bio: Wanderer, café hopper, and sunset lover. Looking for someone to hit Vagator beach shacks and Anjuna clubs!

buddies.name: Kabir Mehta
buddies.bio: Trekked Kheerganga thrice. Looking for buddies to explore secret waterfalls and chill at Parvati valley.

buddies.name: Tanya Sen
buddies.bio: Tea garden enthusiast and nature lover. Planning a detailed spice plantation crawl and Kolukkumalai sunrise trek.

buddies.name: Aarav Goel
buddies.bio: Road trip junkie. Let's rent a Royal Enfield Bullet and ride through Khardung La Pass to Pangong Lake!

buddies.name: Meera Iyer
buddies.bio: Yoga teacher in training. Seeking a buddy for spiritual retreats, scuba diving in Grand Island, and local coastal food.

buddies.name: Rohan Das
buddies.bio: Graphic designer who loves capturing heritage. Let's bike around Lake Pichola and sketch local palaces.

buddies.name: Anjali Goel
buddies.bio: Heading to Paris! Looking for chill buddies to split cafe tabs, rent transport, and explore offbeat viewpoints. Let's make memories!

buddies.name: Vikram Roy
buddies.bio: Heading to Paris! Looking for chill buddies to split cafe tabs, rent transport, and explore offbeat viewpoints. Let's make memories!

posts.name: You (Traveler)
posts.content: hey everyone this side ankit yadav

posts.name: Simran Gill
posts.content: Just arrived in Goa! 🌴 The AI-suggested hostel is absolute gold — met 3 awesome travel buddies in the lobby within 10 minutes. Hit Arambol sunset drums tomorrow if anyone wants to join! 🛵🌊

posts.name: Rohan Verma
posts.content: Ladakh roadtrip Day 2: The mountain passes are full blast. Road is clear and renting the Royal Enfield bikes with the split cost group worked out so cheap! Splitting everything on Tip2Trip split wallet is clean. 🏔️🏍️

safety.desc: No active weather warnings. Standard tides.

timeline.title: Sunset Shack Party & Chill
timeline.activity: Arrive in North Goa, check in, check out shacks. Splitting taxi with Kabir.

timeline.title: Panaji Spice Plantation Crawl
timeline.activity: Trek around local spice gardens and eat local traditional vindaloo. Dress code: light cotton.

timeline.title: Dudhsagar Waterfall Hike
timeline.activity: Adventure trek through forest paths and high streams. Waterproof shoes required.
timeline.alert: High water warning: Stick to marked trails!

safety.desc: Heavy rains expected tomorrow evening. Avoid riverbed campsites.

timeline.title: Chalal Trail Walk
timeline.activity: Walk along the Parvati River, local pine forest paths. Splitting café tab with Riya.

timeline.title: Kheerganga Trek Ascent
timeline.activity: Climb 12km through alpine meadows and local hot water springs.
timeline.alert: Trail warning: Wet slippery rocks near the falls

timeline.title: Tosh Valley Exploration
timeline.activity: Visit the high-altitude remote wooden village and cafés.

safety.desc: Khardung La Pass is open. Border permits operating normally.

timeline.title: Leh Market Walk & Acclimatization
timeline.activity: Wander old palace fort districts. Look for local sketch artists. Ride with Aarav.

timeline.title: Pangong Lake Bike Ride
timeline.activity: Ride 140km through high mountain passes. Keep hydrated at all times.
timeline.alert: Altitude alert: Rest if feeling dizzy or short of breath

timeline.title: Magnetic Hill & Confluence Vibe
timeline.activity: Explore local monasteries, Magnetic Hill, and Indus-Zanskar confluence.

timeline.title: Welcome to Gaya
timeline.activity: Arrive in Gaya, check into your accommodation, and meet local travelers.

timeline.title: Local Sightseeing & Trekking
timeline.activity: Explore the highlights of the area, cafe crawl, and capture scenery.

timeline.title: Departing Journey
timeline.activity: Pack up, grab souvenirs, and head back home with memories.

timeline.title: Welcome to Rafiganj
timeline.activity: Arrive in Rafiganj, check into your accommodation, and meet local travelers.

timeline.title: Local Sightseeing & Trekking
timeline.activity: Explore the highlights of the area, cafe crawl, and capture scenery.

timeline.title: Departing Journey
timeline.activity: Pack up, grab souvenirs, and head back home with memories.

safety.desc: Standard metro lines active. Keep belongings secure.

timeline.title: Eiffel Tower & Seine Cruise
timeline.activity: Check in, head to Trocadéro for photos, take a late evening river cruise.

timeline.title: Louvre Museum & Montmartre Tour
timeline.activity: Pre-book Louvre tickets, visit Mona Lisa, and walk up to Sacré-Cœur basilica for sunset.
timeline.alert: Crowded area warning: Watch out for pickpockets near Montmartre stairs

timeline.title: Champs-Élysées & Arc de Triomphe
timeline.activity: Walk the famous avenue, climb Arc de Triomphe, eat French macarons at Ladurée.

users.name: Jane ExplorerJane Explorer
users.bio: Adventure seeker, high-altitude trekking lover, and cafe crawler.
